title: Supply Chain Manager - Xpressbees - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Xpressbees - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Xpressbees. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Meerut-based team.

About Xpressbees:
Xpressbees is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
